handles.name: GPIO 10
handles.description: Digital In/Out (do not use! connected to the integrated SPI flash)

handles.name: GPIO 5
handles.description: Digital In/Out (outputs PWM signal at boot; be careful: strapping pin)

handles.name: GPIO 7
handles.description: Digital In/Out (do not use! connected to the integrated SPI flash)

handles.name: GPIO 15
handles.description: Digital In/Out (outputs PWM signal at boot; be careful: strapping pin;)

handles.name: GPIO 3
handles.description: Digital In/Out (be careful: used for USB!)

handles.name: GPIO 1
handles.description: Digital In/Out (be careful: used for USB!)

handles.name: GPIO 6
handles.description: Digital In/Out (do not use! connected to the integrated SPI flash)

handles.name: GPIO 8
handles.description: Digital In/Out (do not use! connected to the integrated SPI flash)

handles.name: GPIO 0
handles.description: Digital In/Out (outputs PWM signal at boot; be careful: if LOW  at boot, then enters flashing mode)

handles.name: GPIO 12
handles.description: Digital In/Out (be careful: boot fails if pulled high, strapping pin)
